questions.question: What is the capacity of the PF1 machine?
questions.ground_truth: The PF1 has a capacity of 500 tonnes.
contexts: PF1 Specifications: Capacity 500T, Working area 2000x1500mm, Cycle time 12s, Power 3-phase 400V, Weight 8500kg

questions.question: What is the lead time for a PF1?
questions.ground_truth: The standard lead time for a PF1 is 16-20 weeks from order confirmation.
contexts: PF1 lead time: 16-20 weeks (standard), 12-14 weeks (expedited)

questions.question: Who is the primary contact at Acme Packaging?
questions.ground_truth: Erik Janssen is the CEO and primary contact at Acme Packaging BV.
contexts: Contact: Erik Janssen, CEO, Acme Packaging BV, erik@acme-packaging.com

questions.question: What was the value of the Acme Packaging quote?
questions.ground_truth: The Acme Packaging quote (Q-2024-089) was for 2x PF1 machines valued at EUR 450,000.
contexts: Quote Q-2024-089: Acme Packaging BV, 2x PF1, EUR 450,000, status: proposal sent

questions.question: What was our revenue last quarter?
questions.ground_truth: Q3 2025 revenue was EUR 2.3 million, up 15% quarter-over-quarter.
contexts: Q3 2025 Revenue: EUR 2,300,000 (+15% QoQ)
Major deals closed: Acme Packaging BV (EUR 450K), Nordic Industries (EUR 380K)

questions.question: What is the base price of a PF1?
questions.ground_truth: The PF1 base price is EUR 225,000 for the standard configuration.
contexts: PF1 base price: EUR 225,000 (standard configuration)
PF1 with automation package: EUR 285,000

questions.question: What power supply does the PF1 require?
questions.ground_truth: The PF1 requires a 3-phase 400V power supply.
contexts: PF1 Specifications: Capacity 500T, Working area 2000x1500mm, Cycle time 12s, Power 3-phase 400V, Weight 8500kg

questions.question: What machines does Machinecraft manufacture?
questions.ground_truth: Machinecraft manufactures thermoforming, panel forming, and packaging machines including the PF1 and PF2 models.
contexts: Machinecraft is an industrial machinery company specialising in thermoforming, panel forming, and packaging machines.
Product line: PF1 (precision forming), PF2 (high-volume forming), TF series (thermoforming)
